title: SQL: order by on single row view
poc: CREATE VIEW x AS SELECT 1.0 as score, 'a' as avalue, 'b' AS displayname;
SELECT * FROM x ORDER BY score;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT 1.0 as score) AS x ORDER BY x.score;
key_bug_features: ORDER BY on a single row view
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, score FLOAT, avalue VARCHAR(10), displayname VARCHAR(20));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, score, avalue, displayname) VALUES (1, 1.0, 'a', 'b');
CREATE VIEW single_row_view AS SELECT score, avalue, displayname FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM single_row_view ORDER BY score;
